Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 27}Your Theurgy gauge will increase throughout battle whenever you attack or summon a Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 28}How much the Theurgy gauge increases will vary from ally to ally. {f 0 1 2}Acting according to a party member's personality{f 0 1 27} will cause their Theurgy gauge to increase significantly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Fuuka also has a Theurgy gauge. Once it's maxed, you will be able to activate her Theurgy during a party member's turn.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Be warned that a combatant's gauge will be disabled while afflicted with a status ailment, and {f 0 1 2}if an ally is KO'd, their gauge will drop by half{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
